title: Mappings, Sets, and Nested Data · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Index community resources, remove duplicates, compare inventories, and merge changed records. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a deduplicated resource inventory after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.
Iterate keys, values, and item views while preserving insertion order and avoiding size changes during iteration.
Merge mappings and update nested records with explicit conflict, copy, and schema policies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
